notes:
Ember 1.2.2

• Fix: the free offline brain (Ollama) now actually runs its tools. Smaller local models that write a tool call as plain text (e.g. for "can you see my screen?") used to dump raw JSON into the chat instead of doing it — Ember now understands those and runs the tool (screenshot, click, type, etc.).

Includes 1.2.1's Settings-crash fix and crash logging, plus everything from 1.2.0: works 100% offline, the offline brain can drive your computer + analyse images, countdown timers, the newbie Setup Tour, and the workflow-recorder macOS crash fix.
